delivery.title: Free delivery
delivery.subtitle: Free delivery across Tashkent
delivery.description: Free delivery available across Tashkent city and nearby areas. We deliver your order every morning from 7:00 to 10:00.

questions.a1: Bettery Ration is a healthy meal delivery service in Tashkent. We deliver ready-made meals tailored to your goals every day right to your door.
questions.a2: We offer 4 main plans: 1000, 1500, 1700 and 2500 Kcal. Each plan is designed by a professional dietitian.
questions.q3: How can I place an order?
questions.a3: You can order through our website or by calling +998 71 200 00 01.
questions.a4: Orders are delivered daily in the morning from 7:00 to 10:00. Delivery across Tashkent is free.
questions.a5: You can pay with cash, card (Uzcard, Humo), bank transfer, or via Click/Payme.

quality.title: Quality and Safety
quality.subtitle: Bettery Ration
quality.description: All our meals are prepared in accordance with HACCP safety standards. We use only fresh and natural ingredients.

about.title: About Bettery Ration
about.subtitle: Healthy meal delivery service in Tashkent
about.storyText: Bettery Ration was founded in 2023 in Tashkent. We strive to make healthy eating accessible and delicious for everyone. Our team of professional chefs and dietitians serves over 500 clients daily.
about.missionText: To develop a culture of healthy eating in Uzbekistan. We use only fresh, local, and natural ingredients. Every meal is prepared with care.
about.freshnessText: We cook daily using only fresh ingredients
about.qualityText: We operate according to HACCP standards
